message:
refactor(abi): migrate fadvise64, sched_setscheduler, sched_getscheduler to native syscalls

Replace libc::syscall with frankenlibc_core::syscall wrappers:
- posix_fadvise64: sys_fadvise64
- pthread_setschedparam: sys_sched_setscheduler
- pthread_getschedparam: sys_sched_getscheduler, sys_sched_getparam

Reduces libc::syscall calls from 115 to 111.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
